pages.purpose: Explain the AppConfig system, JSON persistence, encrypted password storage, and settings propagation

pages.purpose: Overview of the main user-facing features and workflows in the application

pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of the multi-step CAS authentication flow, session cookies, and credential management
